title: 1st date of every month
excerpt: I would like to ask you if there is automation in General Caster for the date column. I want when a specific date arrives to change date column to the 1st of every month for example. Thanks.

posts.author: Balaskas (Antonis Balaskas)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to ask you if there is automation in General Caster for the date column. I want when a specific date arrives to change date column to the 1st of every month for example. Thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Balaskas!

General Caster is an app that is built and maintained by another company, but I think you can find what you are looking for in their documentation.

Hope that helps!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Balaskas (Antonis Balaskas)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the reply! Can I use EOMONTH function to solve my problem ?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Balaskas!

If this is a function from that app, then you should contact General Caster’s app support about it. They will know about how to best utilize their app

Cheers,
Matias
